content:
# Uthmaniyah Area

**Summary**: A specific area within the Ghawar field.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2002-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2002]] focused on the uthmaniyah-area to model the Arab-D reservoir.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2002-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2002]] anticline

## Formations Present

- [[2002-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2002]] Arab-D, Jubailah

## Key Findings From This Location

- The Uthmaniyah area is located in the central portion of the Ghawar structure and shows a low anticline with approximately 450 feet of relief along the eastern edge. ([[2002-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2002, p. 26]])
